rule.description: Dragnet [Container]: dragnet-container-2025-0213 — Vulnerable Base Image Pull
rule.field: amazonlinux:2|azure linux:3\.0|debian:11|debian:12|debian:13|debian:14|debian:9|oraclelinux:7|photon os:1\.0|photon os:2\.0|photon os:3\.0|photon os:4\.0|photon os:5\.0|redhat/ubi9:|ubuntu:16\.04-ESM
